ecarx.carext.update.ota

Interface InstallListener


  • public interface InstallListener
    A listener of install events.
    Since:
    5

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  InstallListener.Status
      Installation status.

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onInstallationRemindCallback(int type, java.lang.String content, android.os.Bundle bundle)
      Called when the installed remind.
      void onInstallNow()
      Called when the installation should be performed immediately.
      void onProgressUpdate(int progress, int time, android.os.Bundle extra)
      Called periodically as the installed progresses.

      Called when the status changed.

      • onInstallNow

        void onInstallNow()
        Called when the installation should be performed immediately.
        Since:
        5

      • onProgressUpdate

        void onProgressUpdate(int progress,
                      int time,
                      android.os.Bundle extra)
        Called periodically as the installed progresses.
        Parameters:
        progress - the approximate percentage that has been installed, ranging from 0 to 100 (inclusive).
        time - Installation time remaining
        extra - extra information
        Since:
        11

      • onInstallationRemindCallback

        void onInstallationRemindCallback(int type,
                                  java.lang.String content,
                                  android.os.Bundle bundle)
        Called when the installed remind.
        Parameters:
        type - 0:remind by window 1:remind by mini
        content - remind content
        Since:
        13
